programs.title: Unexpected
programs.desc: Isabella shuts Bryce out before her induction; Mia endures a long, stressful labor that leads to an emergency C-section; Amya's insecurities about her post-baby weight derail date night with Jose.

programs.title: Unexpected
programs.desc: As Mia recovers from her C-section, family tensions flare when Nicole's absence causes hurt on both sides; Bella faces a pregnancy scare; Amya's struggles with her post-pregnancy body; Isabella braces for labor amid Bryce's family drama.

programs.title: Unexpected
programs.desc: Mia and Jessie bring Oakleigh home as Keith's rules spark tension; Bella receives the results of her pregnancy test leading to a tough talk; Isabella delivers Haisley while Bryce's family is left in the dark; Amya and Jose clash over parenting.

programs.title: Unexpected
programs.desc: Bryce asks Isabella to meet his newborn daughter; Mia's dad softens on his cardinal rule; Amya returns to the site of her past humiliation for a shot at redemption; Hunter's father's promise to meet baby Wes causes cautious optimism.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.sub_title: Between the Sheets: The Art of the Slow Fade
programs.desc: Sophie cringes reliving her date with Brian and gets some extra intel from Julia. The cast is at their wits' end watching Cortney entertain Colt back in Orlando. Everyone has big opinions about Gino's breakup and Kim's first date with Wayne.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.desc: In the UK, Kim and Jamal argue about revealing her secrets to Wayne; Colt recovers from surgery while living with Cortney and her new boyfriend; Pedro blows up after discovering Sophie kissed her date; Vanja breaks her celibacy and meets Tony's parents.
